function_reachability: Is there a call path from function 'main' to function 'printf'?

loop_reachability: Can the loop with condition 'row<=LIMIT' be skipped entirely?
Is the loop with condition 'row<=LIMIT' always executed?

Is the loop with condition 'col<row' always executed?
dominators: Does the statement line 14:  <statement> arr[row][row] = 1; </statement> dominate line 3:  <statement> int main() </statement>?
Does the statement line 16:  <statement> for(row=1;row<=LIMIT;row++) </statement> dominate line 24:  <statement> return 0; </statement>?
data_dependency: Does the value of variable row at line 16: <statement> 	for(row=1;row<=LIMIT;row++) </statement> depend on the value of variable col at line 10: <statement> 		for(col=2;col<row;col++) </statement>?
liveness: Does variable 'col' remain in use at the end of function 'main'?
Does variable 'arr' remain in use at the end of function 'main'?
dead_code: Is the statement 'arr[row][col] = arr[row-1][col-1] + arr[row-1][col];' unreachable?
